channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Palbociclib Approved for HER2+ Breast Cancer Maintenance Therapy
item.description: Palbociclib becomes the first CDK4/6 inhibitor approved for metastatic disease regardless of HER2 status. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Can AI Serve as Your Therapist? An Expert Weighs In
item.description: Over a third of psychologists report patients using AI for mental health support. As more people turn to...

item.title: AI-Driven 'Master Key' Vaccine May Target Entire Virus Families
item.description: Known by acronyms like COVID, SARS, and Ebola, these viruses evoke fear. A new AI-aided vaccine approach...

item.title: Immune System 'Peacemakers' Could Enable Long-Term Disease Remission
item.description: "Peacemaker" immune cells may treat diseases from type 1 diabetes to neurodegeneration by restoring immune tolerance, according to new...
